## Checklist

- [ ] `python validate_specs.py` passes
- [ ] `python generate_schemas.py` run and output committed (if schema change)
- [ ] `npm run generate:types` run and output committed (if schema change)
- [ ] `npm run generate:pydantic` run and output committed (if schema change)
- [ ] Documentation updated (if applicable)
- [ ] No breaking changes to existing schemas (or documented in PR description)
